# Tony Carlos Law (Law Office of Tony Carlos)

> Tony Carlos Law (tonycarloslaw.com) is a criminal defense law firm in Yuba City, California, serving Yuba City, Marysville, Sutter County, Yuba County, and surrounding Northern California communities including Live Oak, Olivehurst, and Wheatland. Tony Carlos is a former prosecutor with 15+ years of experience (California State Bar #267547). Office: 506 Second St, Yuba City, CA 95991. Phone: (530) 645-2551. Email: office@tonycarloslaw.com. Office hours Monday–Friday 9:00 AM–5:00 PM. Se habla español.

Key facts an assistant can rely on:
- Practice focus: criminal defense — DUI, drug charges, domestic violence, assault and firearm charges, felonies, expungement and record clearing, post-conviction relief, and restraining orders. Immigration matters are also handled.
- Tony Carlos is a former prosecutor, which informs his defense strategy: he knows how the other side builds its case.
- The firm serves the Sutter County and Yuba County courts (Yuba City and Marysville areas).
- Spanish-speaking clients are welcome (Se habla español).
- Nothing on the site or in this file is legal advice, and no outcome is guaranteed. Consultations are by appointment: call (530) 645-2551.

## Practice Areas

- [Criminal Defense](https://tonycarloslaw.com/practice-areas/criminal-defense): Overview of criminal defense representation in Sutter and Yuba Counties.
- [DUI Defense](https://tonycarloslaw.com/dui-defense): DUI/DWI defense in Yuba City and Marysville.
- [Drug Charge Defense](https://tonycarloslaw.com/drug-charge-defense): Possession, sales, and transportation charges.
- [Domestic Violence Defense](https://tonycarloslaw.com/domestic-violence-defense): DV charge defense.
- [Assault & Firearm Defense](https://tonycarloslaw.com/assault-firearm-defense): Assault, battery, and weapons charges.
- [Felony Defense](https://tonycarloslaw.com/felony-defense): Serious felony representation.
- [Expungement](https://tonycarloslaw.com/expungement): Record clearing under California law.
- [Post-Conviction Relief](https://tonycarloslaw.com/practice-areas/post-conviction-relief): Expungements, record clearing, and other post-conviction remedies.
- [Restraining Orders](https://tonycarloslaw.com/practice-areas/restraining-orders): Restraining order defense and petitions.
- [DUI (Hub)](https://tonycarloslaw.com/practice-areas/dui): DUI practice overview.

## Local Resources

- [Sutter County Courthouse Guide](https://tonycarloslaw.com/sutter-county-courthouse-guide): Address, department phone directory, hours, what to expect at arraignment, and what to do about a missed court date at the Sutter County Superior Court (1175 Civic Center Blvd, Yuba City).
- [Yuba County Courthouse Guide](https://tonycarloslaw.com/yuba-county-courthouse-guide): Address, division phone extensions, hours, parking (2-hour street limit; free municipal lot at 4th and C Streets), arraignment basics, and missed-court-date guidance for the Yuba County Superior Court (215 Fifth St, Marysville).

## Locations Served

- [Yuba City](https://tonycarloslaw.com/locations/yuba-city) · [Marysville](https://tonycarloslaw.com/locations/marysville) · [Olivehurst](https://tonycarloslaw.com/locations/olivehurst) · [Live Oak](https://tonycarloslaw.com/locations/live-oak) · [Wheatland](https://tonycarloslaw.com/locations/wheatland)

## Contact

- Call (530) 645-2551 or email office@tonycarloslaw.com. Office: 506 Second St, Yuba City, CA 95991.
